ddls:
CREATE TABLE "financial_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial report */,
  "ticker" TEXT /* Ticker symbol of the company */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date of the financial report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of financial report (e.g., Income Statement, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow) */,
  "fiscal_period" TEXT /* Fiscal period of the report (e.g., 2021-03, 2020-12) */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update to the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the report */,
  "approval_date" TEXT /* Date of approval */,
  "audit_trail" TEXT /* Detailed log of changes and actions related to the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_financial_reports_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income_statement" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report */,
  "revenue" REAL /* Total revenue for the period */,
  "sga_expense" REAL /* Selling, General, and Administrative (SG&A) expenses */,
  "net_income" REAL /* Net income for the period */,
  "pre_tax_income" REAL /* Pre-tax income for the period */,
  "tax_provision" REAL /* Provision for income taxes */,
  "cost_of_goods_sold" REAL /* Cost of goods sold */,
  "gross_profit" REAL /* Gross profit (revenue - cost of goods sold) */,
  "operating_income" REAL /* Operating income (revenue - operating expenses) */,
  "ebitda" REAL /* Earnings Before Interest, Taxes, Depreciation, and Amortization */,
  "depreciation_amortization" REAL /* Depreciation and amortization expenses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "balance_sheet" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report */,
  "total_assets" REAL /* Total assets of the company */,
  "total_liabilities" REAL /* Total liabilities of the company */,
  "shareholders_equity" REAL /* Shareholders' equity of the company */,
  "total_current_assets" REAL /* Total current assets of the company */,
  "total_current_liabilities" REAL /* Total current liabilities of the company */,
  "total_long_term_assets" REAL /* Total long-term assets of the company */,
  "total_long_term_liabilities" REAL /* Total long-term liabilities of the company */,
  "cash_and_cash_equivalents" REAL /* Cash and cash equivalents */,
  "short_term_investments" REAL /* Short-term investments */,
  "inventory" REAL /* Inventory */,
  "long_term_investments" REAL /* Long-term investments */,
  "other_assets" REAL /* Other assets */,
  "other_liabilities" REAL /* Other liabilities */,
  "deferred_tax_assets" REAL /* Deferred tax assets */,
  "deferred_tax_liabilities" REAL /* Deferred tax liabilities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cash_flow_statement" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report */,
  "cash_and_short_term_investments" REAL /* Cash and short-term investments */,
  "net_loan_assets" REAL /* Net loan assets */,
  "net_operating_interest_income" REAL /* Net operating interest income */,
  "net_non_operating_interest_income_expense" REAL /* Net non-operating interest income/expense */,
  "accrued_comprehensive_income" REAL /* Accrued comprehensive income */,
  "current_debt_capital_lease_obligation" REAL /* Current debt and capital lease obligation */,
  "cash_flow_from_operating_activities" REAL /* Cash flow from operating activities */,
  "cash_flow_from_investing_activities" REAL /* Cash flow from investing activities */,
  "cash_flow_from_financing_activities" REAL /* Cash flow from financing activities */,
  "net_change_in_cash" REAL /* Net change in cash */,
  "beginning_cash_balance" REAL /* Beginning cash balance */,
  "ending_cash_balance" REAL /* Ending cash balance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "asset_details" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report */,
  "net_ppe" REAL /* Net Property, Plant, and Equipment (PPE) */,
  "goodwill_intangibles" REAL /* Goodwill and intangible assets */,
  "total_receivables" REAL /* Total receivables */,
  "total_payables" REAL /* Total payables and accrued expenses */,
  "inventory_assets" REAL /* Inventory assets */,
  "prepaid_expenses" REAL /* Prepaid expenses */,
  "other_current_assets" REAL /* Other current assets */,
  "long_term_investments_assets" REAL /* Long-term investments assets */,
  "property_plant_equipment" REAL /* Property, plant, and equipment */,
  "accumulated_depreciation" REAL /* Accumulated depreciation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "liability_details" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report */,
  "non_current_deferred_liabilities" REAL /* Non-current deferred liabilities */,
  "non_current_ltd_capital_lease_obligation" REAL /* Non-current portion of long-term debt and capital lease obligation */,
  "accounts_payable" REAL /* Accounts payable */,
  "accrued_liabilities" REAL /* Accrued liabilities */,
  "other_current_liabilities" REAL /* Other current liabilities */,
  "long_term_debt" REAL /* Long-term debt */,
  "deferred_revenue" REAL /* Deferred revenue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operating_expenses" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report */,
  "total_operating_expenses" REAL /* Total operating expenses */,
  "research_and_development" REAL /* Research and development expenses */,
  "marketing_expenses" REAL /* Marketing expenses */,
  "administrative_expenses" REAL /* Administrative expenses */,
  "other_operating_expenses" REAL /* Other operating expenses */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "eps_details" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report */,
  "eps_basic" REAL /* Basic earnings per share */,
  "eps_diluted" REAL /* Diluted earnings per share */,
  "weighted_average_shares_outstanding" REAL /* Weighted average shares outstanding */,
  "weighted_average_diluted_shares_outstanding" REAL /* Weighted average diluted shares outstanding */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "capital_stock" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report */,
  "total_capital_stock" REAL /* Total capital stock */,
  "common_stock" REAL /* Common stock */,
  "preferred_stock" REAL /* Preferred stock */,
  "additional_paid_in_capital" REAL /* Additional paid-in capital */,
  "retained_earnings" REAL /* Retained earnings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., financial analyst, executive, auditor) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the report was accessed */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the report */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the device used to access the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES financial_reports ("report_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each financial report
Type of financial report (e.g., Income Statement, Balance Sheet, Cash Flow)

Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived)

Date of the user's last login
Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive)
